ingredients_with_amounts: Ackee (1 can) | Saltfish (250g) | Onion (1 medium) | Scotch Bonnet (2 whole) | Tomato (2 medium) | Thyme (3 sprigs) | Green Onions (4 stalks) | Black Pepper (1 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Boil saltfish for 20 minutes to desalt, changing water twice | Step 2: Flake saltfish into small pieces, removing bones | Step 3: Sauté onion, scotch bonnet, and thyme in oil until soft | Step 4: Add tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes | Step 5: Add flaked saltfish and stir well | Step 6: Gently fold in ackee and cook for 3 minutes | Step 7: Season with black pepper and serve with dumplings or breadfruit

ingredients_with_amounts: Apples (6 large) | Pie Crust (1 double crust) | Brown Sugar (1/2 cup) | White Sugar (1/2 cup) | Cinnamon (2 tbsp) | Nutmeg (1/2 tsp) | Lemon Juice (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Roll out bottom crust and place in pie dish | Step 3: Peel and slice apples, toss with sugars, cinnamon, nutmeg, and lemon juice | Step 4: Pour apple mixture into crust | Step 5: Top with second crust, seal edges, and cut vents | Step 6: Bake for 45-50 minutes until golden | Step 7: Cool before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Pieces (3 lbs) | BBQ Sauce (1 1/2 cups) | Brown Sugar (2 tbsp) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Paprika (1 tbsp) | Chili Powder (1 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Mix brown sugar, garlic, paprika, and chili powder to make a rub | Step 2: Season chicken pieces generously with the rub | Step 3: Preheat grill to medium heat | Step 4: Grill chicken for 30-40 minutes, turning occasionally | Step 5: Brush with BBQ sauce during last 10 minutes | Step 6: Serve hot with coleslaw and cornbread

ingredients_with_amounts: Beans - Navy (500g) | Bacon (4 slices) | Onion (1 medium) | Molasses (1/4 cup) | Brown Sugar (1/4 cup) | Mustard (1 tbsp) | Tomato Paste (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Soak beans overnight in cold water | Step 2: Drain beans and place in large pot with fresh water | Step 3: Simmer for 1 hour until beans are tender | Step 4: Preheat oven to 325°F | Step 5: Dice bacon and onion, sauté until bacon is crispy | Step 6: Combine beans, bacon, onion, molasses, brown sugar, mustard, and tomato paste in baking dish | Step 7: Bake covered for 2 hours, uncovering for last 30 minutes

ingredients_with_amounts: Salmon Fillet (4 pieces) | Lemon (1 whole) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Dill (2 tbsp) | Salt (1 tsp) | Black Pepper (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Place salmon on baking sheet lined with parchment | Step 3: Mince garlic and mix with olive oil | Step 4: Brush salmon with garlic oil mixture | Step 5: Season with salt, pepper, and fresh dill | Step 6: Top with lemon slices | Step 7: Bake for 12-15 minutes until flaky | Step 8: Serve with roasted vegetables or rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Ziti Pasta (500g) | Ground Beef (500g) | Tomato Sauce (3 cups) | Ricotta Cheese (15 oz) | Mozzarella Cheese (2 cups) | Parmesan Cheese (1/2 cup) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Onion (1 medium)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Cook pasta according to package directions, drain | Step 3: Brown ground beef with onion and garlic | Step 4: Add tomato sauce and simmer for 10 minutes | Step 5: In a large bowl, combine pasta, meat sauce, and ricotta | Step 6: Transfer to baking dish, top with mozzarella and parmesan | Step 7: Bake for 25-30 minutes until bubbly and golden

ingredients_with_amounts: Cassava (2 lbs) | Salt (1 tsp) | Coconut Milk (1 cup) | Oil (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Peel and grate cassava finely | Step 2: Squeeze out excess liquid using cheesecloth | Step 3: Mix grated cassava with salt | Step 4: Form into flat round cakes, about 1/2 inch thick | Step 5: Heat oil in skillet over medium heat | Step 6: Fry bammy for 3-4 minutes per side until golden | Step 7: Dip in coconut milk before serving | Step 8: Serve with fish or breakfast dishes

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Bananas (3 ripe) | Sugar (1 cup) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Eggs (2) | Baking Soda (1 tsp) | Walnuts (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F and grease loaf pan | Step 2: Mash bananas in a large bowl | Step 3: Cream butter and sugar together, add eggs | Step 4: Mix in mashed bananas | Step 5: Combine flour and baking soda, fold into wet ingredients | Step 6: Fold in walnuts | Step 7: Pour into loaf pan and bake for 55-60 minutes | Step 8: Cool before slicing

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Bananas (3 ripe) | Sugar (3/4 cup) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Eggs (2) | Baking Powder (2 tsp) | Walnuts (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F and line muffin tin | Step 2: Mash bananas in a large bowl | Step 3: Melt butter and mix with sugar, then add eggs | Step 4: Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed | Step 5: Fold in walnuts | Step 6: Fill muffin cups 3/4 full | Step 7: Bake for 18-20 minutes until toothpick comes clean

ingredients_with_amounts: Bananas (3 ripe) | Flour (1/2 cup) | Sugar (2 tbsp) | Baking Powder (1 tsp) | Nutmeg (1/2 tsp) | Oil (for frying)
instructions: Step 1: Mash bananas in a bowl until smooth | Step 2: Add flour, sugar, baking powder, and nutmeg | Step 3: Mix until combined (batter will be thick) | Step 4: Heat oil in a deep skillet | Step 5: Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil | Step 6: Fry until golden brown on both sides | Step 7: Drain on paper towels and serve warm

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (1 1/2 cups) | Bananas (2 ripe) | Milk (1 1/4 cups) | Eggs (2) | Butter (3 tbsp) | Baking Powder (2 tsp) | Maple Syrup (for serving)
instructions: Step 1: Mash bananas in a large bowl | Step 2: Add eggs, milk, and melted butter, whisk to combine | Step 3: In separate bowl, mix flour and baking powder | Step 4: Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed | Step 5: Heat griddle over medium heat | Step 6: Pour 1/4 cup batter for each pancake | Step 7: Cook until bubbles form, flip and cook until golden

ingredients_with_amounts: Vanilla Wafers (1 box) | Bananas (4 ripe) | Vanilla Pudding Mix (2 boxes) | Milk (4 cups) | Cream Cheese (8 oz) | Whipped Cream (2 cups)
instructions: Step 1: Prepare pudding with milk according to package directions | Step 2: In separate bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth | Step 3: Fold cream cheese into pudding | Step 4: Slice bananas | Step 5: In a trifle dish, layer wafers, bananas, and pudding | Step 6: Repeat layers, ending with pudding | Step 7: Top with whipped cream | Step 8: Chill for at least 4 hours before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Flank Steak (500g) | Broccoli (1 head) | Soy Sauce (1/4 cup) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Ginger (1 inch) | Cornstarch (1 tbsp) | Vegetable Oil (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Slice beef thinly against the grain | Step 2: Mix soy sauce, cornstarch, and 2 tbsp water for sauce | Step 3: Marinate beef in half the sauce for 15 minutes | Step 4: Cut broccoli into florets | Step 5: Heat oil in wok, stir-fry beef until browned, remove | Step 6: Stir-fry garlic and ginger, add broccoli with water | Step 7: Return beef to wok, add remaining sauce | Step 8: Cook until sauce thickens, serve with rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Stew Meat (500g) | Barley (1 cup) | Beef Broth (6 cups) | Carrots (2) | Celery (2 stalks) | Onion (1 large) | Tomatoes (1 can)
instructions: Step 1: Brown beef in large pot, remove and set aside | Step 2: Sauté onion, carrots, and celery until soft | Step 3: Add beef back to pot with broth and tomatoes | Step 4: Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour | Step 5: Add barley and simmer for 30-40 minutes until tender | Step 6: Season with salt and pepper to taste | Step 7: Serve hot with crusty bread

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Flank Steak (500g) | Flour Tortillas (8 large) | Rice (2 cups cooked) | Black Beans (1 can) | Bell Peppers (1) | Onion (1 medium) | Cheddar Cheese (2 cups)
instructions: Step 1: Season beef with salt and pepper, cook until desired doneness | Step 2: Slice beef into thin strips | Step 3: Warm tortillas in dry skillet | Step 4: Sauté bell peppers and onion until soft | Step 5: Lay out tortillas, layer rice, beans, beef, and veggies | Step 6: Top with cheese, fold in sides and roll tightly | Step 7: Optional: grill seam-side down until crispy | Step 8: Serve with salsa and sour cream

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Stew Meat (1 kg) | Curry Powder (3 tbsp) | Onion (2 medium) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Ginger (2 inch) | Potatoes (3 medium) | Coconut Milk (1 can)
instructions: Step 1: Toast curry powder in dry pan until fragrant | Step 2: Brown beef in batches, set aside | Step 3: Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger until soft | Step 4: Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute | Step 5: Return beef to pot, add coconut milk and 1 cup water | Step 6: Simmer covered for 1 1/2 hours until beef is tender | Step 7: Add potatoes and cook for 20 more minutes | Step 8: Serve with rice and roti

ingredients_with_amounts: Ground Beef (500g) | Corn Tortillas (12) | Enchilada Sauce (2 cans) | Cheddar Cheese (2 cups) | Onion (1 medium) | Black Olives (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Brown ground beef with onion, drain fat | Step 3: Warm tortillas in microwave or dry skillet | Step 4: Pour 1/2 cup enchilada sauce in baking dish | Step 5: Fill each tortilla with beef and cheese, roll up | Step 6: Place seam-side down in baking dish | Step 7: Top with remaining sauce and cheese | Step 8: Sprinkle with olives and bake for 20-25 minutes

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Sirloin (1 kg) | Bell Peppers (3) | Red Onion (2) | Mushrooms (250g) | Olive Oil (1/4 cup) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Dried Herbs (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Cut beef into 1-inch cubes | Step 2: Cut peppers and onion into chunks | Step 3: Mix olive oil, minced garlic, and herbs for marinade | Step 4: Marinate beef for at least 2 hours | Step 5: Thread beef and vegetables onto skewers | Step 6: Preheat grill to high heat | Step 7: Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally | Step 8: Rest for 5 minutes before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Chuck (1.5 kg) | Potatoes (4) | Carrots (4) | Onion (2) | Beef Broth (4 cups) | Tomato Paste (2 tbsp) | Peas (1 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Cut beef into 2-inch cubes, season with salt and pepper | Step 2: Brown beef in batches in hot oil | Step 3: Sauté onion until soft, add tomato paste | Step 4: Return beef to pot, add beef broth | Step 5: Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer for 2 hours | Step 6: Add potatoes and carrots, cook for 30 minutes | Step 7: Add peas and cook for 5 more minutes | Step 8: Serve hot with crusty bread

ingredients_with_amounts: Ground Beef (500g) | Taco Shells (12) | Taco Seasoning (2 tbsp) | Lettuce (2 cups shredded) | Tomato (2 diced) | Cheddar Cheese (1 1/2 cups) | Sour Cream (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Brown ground beef in skillet, drain fat | Step 2: Add taco seasoning and 1/2 cup water, simmer until thickened | Step 3: Warm taco shells according to package | Step 4: Shred lettuce and dice tomato | Step 5: Assemble tacos with beef, lettuce, tomato, and cheese | Step 6: Top with sour cream and hot sauce | Step 7: Serve immediately

ingredients_with_amounts: Beef Tenderloin (1 kg) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Rosemary (3 sprigs) | Thyme (3 sprigs) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Butter (2 tbsp) | Salt (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Remove beef from fridge 1 hour before cooking | Step 2: Preheat oven to 425°F | Step 3: Rub beef with olive oil, salt, and pepper | Step 4: Sliver garlic and insert into beef | Step 5: Heat skillet, sear beef on all sides | Step 6: Add butter and herbs, transfer to oven | Step 7: Roast for 20-25 minutes for medium-rare | Step 8: Rest for 15 minutes before slicing

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Butter (1/2 cup cold) | Milk (3/4 cup) | Baking Powder (1 tbsp) | Salt (1/2 tsp) | Sugar (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 425°F | Step 2: Mix flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar | Step 3: Cut cold butter into flour mixture until crumbly | Step 4: Add milk and stir until just combined | Step 5: Turn dough onto floured surface, knead gently | Step 6: Pat to 1-inch thickness, cut with biscuit cutter | Step 7: Place on baking sheet, bake for 12-15 minutes | Step 8: Serve warm with butter

ingredients_with_amounts: Black Beans (500g dried) | Onion (1 large) | Bell Pepper (1) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Cumin (1 tbsp) | Chicken Broth (4 cups) | Lime Juice (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Soak beans overnight, drain and rinse | Step 2: Sauté onion, pepper, and garlic until soft | Step 3: Add beans, cumin, and broth, bring to boil | Step 4: Simmer for 1 1/2 hours until beans are tender | Step 5: Blend half the soup for thickness, return to pot | Step 6: Season with salt, pepper, and lime juice | Step 7: Serve with sour cream and cilantro

ingredients_with_amounts: Black Eyed Peas (500g) | Bacon (4 slices) | Onion (1 large) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Chicken Broth (4 cups) | Thyme (3 sprigs) | Hot Sauce (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Soak peas overnight, drain and rinse | Step 2: Dice bacon and render in large pot | Step 3: Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft | Step 4: Add peas, broth, and thyme, bring to boil | Step 5: Simmer for 1 hour until peas are tender | Step 6: Season with salt, pepper, and hot sauce | Step 7: Serve with rice or cornbread

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Blueberries (1 1/2 cups) | Sugar (1 cup) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Milk (1/2 cup) | Eggs (2) | Baking Powder (2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F and line muffin tin | Step 2: Cream butter and sugar until light | Step 3: Add eggs one at a time, then milk | Step 4: Mix flour and baking powder, fold into wet ingredients | Step 5: Gently fold in blueberries | Step 6: Fill muffin cups 3/4 full | Step 7: Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden | Step 8: Cool in pan for 5 minutes before removing

ingredients_with_amounts: Broccoli (2 heads) | Cheddar Cheese (2 cups) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Chicken Broth (4 cups) | Heavy Cream (1 cup) | Carrots (2)
instructions: Step 1: Chop broccoli into small florets | Step 2: Sauté onion and garlic in butter until soft | Step 3: Add chicken broth and bring to boil | Step 4: Add broccoli and carrots, simmer until tender | Step 5: Blend soup until smooth (optional) | Step 6: Reduce heat, add cream and cheese | Step 7: Stir until cheese melts, season with salt and pepper | Step 8: Serve hot with crusty bread

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (3 lbs) | Browning Sauce (2 tbsp) | Onions (2) | Bell Peppers (2) | Carrots (2) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Thyme (4 sprigs) | Ketchup (3 tbsp) | Flour (1/4 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and browning sauce | Step 2: Coat chicken in flour, shake off excess | Step 3: Brown chicken in hot oil, remove and set aside | Step 4: Sauté onions, peppers, carrots, and garlic until soft | Step 5: Add ketchup and 1 cup water, bring to simmer | Step 6: Return chicken to pot, add thyme | Step 7: Cover and simmer for 25-30 minutes until chicken is cooked | Step 8: Serve with rice and peas

ingredients_with_amounts: Butter (1 cup) | Sugar (2 cups) | Eggs (4) | Cocoa Powder (1 cup) | Flour (1 cup) | Chocolate Chips (1 cup) | Vanilla Extract (2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F and grease 9x13 pan | Step 2: Melt butter, stir in cocoa powder | Step 3: Add sugar and vanilla, mix well | Step 4: Add eggs one at a time, beating well | Step 5: Fold in flour until just combined | Step 6: Stir in chocolate chips | Step 7: Pour into pan and bake for 25-30 minutes | Step 8: Cool completely before cutting

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Brown Sugar (1 cup) | Baking Powder (2 tsp) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Ginger (2 tbsp grated) | Water (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F | Step 2: Mix flour, brown sugar, and baking powder | Step 3: Cut in butter until mixture resembles crumbs | Step 4: Add grated ginger and enough water to form dough | Step 5: Knead gently and shape into rounds | Step 6: Place on baking sheet | Step 7: Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden | Step 8: Cool on wire rack

ingredients_with_amounts: Butternut Squash (1 large) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Ginger (1 inch) | Vegetable Broth (4 cups) | Coconut Milk (1/2 cup) | Nutmeg (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Peel and cube squash | Step 2: Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger until soft | Step 3: Add squash and broth, bring to boil | Step 4: Simmer for 20-25 minutes until squash is tender | Step 5: Blend soup until smooth | Step 6: Return to pot, stir in coconut milk | Step 7: Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg | Step 8: Serve hot with crusty bread

ingredients_with_amounts: Romaine Lettuce (2 heads) | Parmesan Cheese (1/2 cup) | Croutons (1 cup) | Olive Oil (1/4 cup) | Lemon Juice (2 tbsp) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Anchovies (4 fillets)
instructions: Step 1: Wash and dry lettuce, tear into bite-sized pieces | Step 2: In a bowl, mash garlic and anchovies into paste | Step 3: Whisk in lemon juice, then slowly add olive oil | Step 4: Toss lettuce with dressing | Step 5: Add croutons and most of the parmesan | Step 6: Toss again and top with remaining cheese | Step 7: Serve immediately

ingredients_with_amounts: Callaloo (1 bunch) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Tomato (1 medium) | Scotch Bonnet (1 whole) | Thyme (2 sprigs) | Coconut Milk (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Wash callaloo thoroughly, chop coarsely | Step 2: Sauté onion and garlic until soft | Step 3: Add tomato and cook for 2 minutes | Step 4: Add callaloo, thyme, and whole scotch bonnet | Step 5: Pour in coconut milk | Step 6: Cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes until wilted | Step 7: Remove scotch bonnet before serving | Step 8: Serve with rice and peas or as a side

ingredients_with_amounts: Tomatoes (4 large) | Fresh Mozzarella (250g) | Basil (1 bunch) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Balsamic Glaze (1 tbsp) | Salt (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella into 1/4-inch slices | Step 2: Arrange alternating slices on a platter | Step 3: Tuck basil leaves between slices | Step 4: Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze | Step 5: Sprinkle with flaky salt | Step 6: Serve at room temperature

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Carrots (2 cups grated) | Sugar (1 1/2 cups) | Oil (1 cup) | Eggs (4) | Walnuts (1 cup) | Cream Cheese Frosting (1 recipe)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease 9x13 pan | Step 2: Mix flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt | Step 3: Beat eggs, sugar, and oil until combined | Step 4: Fold in dry ingredients until just mixed | Step 5: Stir in carrots and walnuts | Step 6: Pour into pan and bake for 35-40 minutes | Step 7: Cool completely before frosting | Step 8: Frost with cream cheese frosting

ingredients_with_amounts: Cream Cheese (32 oz) | Sugar (1 1/2 cups) | Eggs (4) | Graham Cracker Crumbs (2 cups) | Butter (1/2 cup melted) | Sour Cream (1 cup) | Vanilla Extract (2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 325°F | Step 2: Mix crumbs and butter, press into springform pan | Step 3: Bake crust for 10 minutes, cool | Step 4: Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth | Step 5: Add eggs one at a time, then sour cream and vanilla | Step 6: Pour filling over crust | Step 7: Bake in water bath for 60-70 minutes | Step 8: Cool slowly, chill overnight before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (1 whole) | Flour (2 cups) | Baking Powder (1 tbsp) | Milk (1 cup) | Carrots (3) | Celery (3 stalks) | Onion (1 large)
instructions: Step 1: Cover chicken with water in large pot, simmer for 1 hour | Step 2: Remove chicken, shred meat, return bones to pot | Step 3: Add carrots, celery, and onion, simmer for 30 minutes | Step 4: Remove bones, add chicken back | Step 5: Mix flour, baking powder, and salt, stir in milk | Step 6: Drop spoonfuls of dumpling batter into simmering soup | Step 7: Cover and cook for 15 minutes without lifting lid | Step 8: Serve hot

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (2 cups cooked) | Flour Tortillas (4 large) | Romaine Lettuce (2 cups) | Parmesan Cheese (1/4 cup) | Caesar Dressing (1/4 cup) | Croutons (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Slice cooked chicken breast | Step 2: Chop romaine lettuce | Step 3: Warm tortillas in dry skillet | Step 4: Toss chicken, lettuce, parmesan, and dressing in a bowl | Step 5: Add croutons and toss again | Step 6: Divide mixture between tortillas | Step 7: Fold in sides and roll tightly | Step 8: Cut in half and serve

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (1 kg) | Curry Powder (3 tbsp) | Onion (2) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Ginger (2 inch) | Potatoes (3) | Coconut Milk (1 can)
instructions: Step 1: Toast curry powder in dry pot until fragrant | Step 2: Brown chicken pieces, remove and set aside | Step 3: Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger until soft | Step 4: Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute | Step 5: Return chicken to pot, add coconut milk and 1 cup water | Step 6: Simmer covered for 30 minutes | Step 7: Add potatoes and cook for 20 more minutes | Step 8: Serve with rice and roti

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (500g) | Bell Peppers (3) | Onion (2) | Fajita Seasoning (2 tbsp) | Flour Tortillas (12) | Sour Cream (1/2 cup) | Salsa (1 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Slice chicken into thin strips | Step 2: Slice peppers and onion into strips | Step 3: Heat oil in large skillet | Step 4: Cook chicken until no longer pink, remove | Step 5: Sauté peppers and onion until soft | Step 6: Return chicken to pan, add seasoning and 1/4 cup water | Step 7: Cook until sauce thickens | Step 8: Serve with warm tortillas and toppings

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (2 cups cooked) | Rice (3 cups cooked
category: day-old) | Eggs (3) | Carrots (2) | Peas (1 cup) | Green Onions (4) | Soy Sauce (3 tbsp)
column6: Step 1: Scramble eggs in wok, remove and set aside | Step 2: Stir-fry carrots and peas until tender | Step 3: Add rice and break up clumps | Step 4: Add chicken, soy sauce, and green onions | Step 5: Stir-fry until everything is hot | Step 6: Add scrambled eggs back | Step 7: Season with additional soy sauce to taste | Step 8: Serve hot

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (4 pieces) | Flour (1/2 cup) | Mushrooms (250g) | Marsala Wine (1 cup) | Chicken Broth (1/2 cup) | Butter (2 tbsp) | Parsley (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Pound chicken breasts to even thickness | Step 2: Dredge chicken in flour, shake off excess | Step 3: Brown chicken in butter, remove and set aside | Step 4: Sauté mushrooms in same pan | Step 5: Add marsala wine and broth, scrape up browned bits | Step 6: Simmer until sauce reduces by half | Step 7: Return chicken to pan, cook for 5 minutes | Step 8: Garnish with parsley and serve

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (1 whole) | Egg Noodles (250g) | Carrots (3) | Celery (3 stalks) | Onion (1 large) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Parsley (1/4 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Cover chicken with water in large pot, simmer for 1 hour | Step 2: Remove chicken, shred meat, return bones to pot | Step 3: Add carrots, celery, onion, and garlic | Step 4: Simmer for 30 minutes, remove bones | Step 5: Add noodles and cook until tender | Step 6: Return shredded chicken to pot | Step 7: Season with salt, pepper, and parsley | Step 8: Serve hot

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (4 pieces) | Bread Crumbs (1 1/2 cups) | Eggs (2) | Parmesan Cheese (1/4 cup) | Marinara Sauce (2 cups) | Mozzarella Cheese (1 1/2 cups) | Pasta (400g)
instructions: Step 1: Pound chicken breasts to even thickness | Step 2: Set up breading station with flour, eggs, bread crumbs | Step 3: Dredge chicken in flour, then egg, then bread crumbs | Step 4: Fry chicken until golden, drain on paper towels | Step 5: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 6: Spread marinara in baking dish, add chicken | Step 7: Top with mozzarella and parmesan | Step 8: Bake for 20 minutes, serve with pasta

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (4 pieces) | Flour (1/2 cup) | Butter (4 tbsp) | Lemon Juice (1/4 cup) | Capers (2 tbsp) | Chicken Broth (1/2 cup) | Parsley (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Pound chicken breasts to even thickness | Step 2: Dredge chicken in flour, shake off excess | Step 3: Brown chicken in butter, remove and set aside | Step 4: Add lemon juice, capers, and broth to pan | Step 5: Scrape up browned bits, simmer until slightly thickened | Step 6: Return chicken to pan, cook for 3 minutes | Step 7: Garnish with parsley | Step 8: Serve with pasta or vegetables

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (2 cups cooked) | Flour Tortillas (4 large) | Monterey Jack Cheese (2 cups) | Bell Peppers (1) | Onion (1 medium) | Sour Cream (1/2 cup) | Salsa (1 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Shred or dice cooked chicken | Step 2: Slice bell peppers and onion thinly | Step 3: Sauté peppers and onion until soft | Step 4: Lay tortillas flat, top half with cheese | Step 5: Add chicken and vegetables, top with more cheese | Step 6: Fold tortillas over and press gently | Step 7: Cook in dry skillet until golden on both sides | Step 8: Cut into wedges and serve with sour cream and salsa

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (3 cups cooked) | Mayonnaise (1/2 cup) | Celery (2 stalks) | Red Grapes (1 cup) | Walnuts (1/2 cup) | Lemon Juice (1 tbsp) | Parsley (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Dice or shred cooked chicken | Step 2: Dice celery finely | Step 3: Halve grapes | Step 4: Chop walnuts | Step 5: Combine all ingredients in a bowl | Step 6: Add mayonnaise and lemon juice | Step 7: Mix well and season with salt and pepper | Step 8: Chill before serving on bread or lettuce

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (500g) | Cooked Rice (3 cups) | Carrots (1 cup
category: diced) | Peas (1 cup) | Onion (1 small) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Soy Sauce (3 tbsp) | Eggs (2) | Vegetable Oil (2 tbsp)
column6: Step 1: Dice chicken and sauté in oil until cooked | Step 2: Push chicken to the side and scramble eggs in same pan | Step 3: Add diced onion, garlic, carrots, and peas, stir-fry 3-4 minutes | Step 4: Add cooked rice and soy sauce, mix well | Step 5: Stir-fry until everything is evenly heated | Step 6: Serve hot

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Breast (500g) | Broccoli (1 head) | Carrots (2) | Bell Peppers (2) | Onion (1) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Ginger (1 inch) | Soy Sauce (3 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Slice chicken into thin strips | Step 2: Cut vegetables into bite-sized pieces | Step 3: Heat oil in wok | Step 4: Stir-fry chicken until cooked, remove | Step 5: Stir-fry garlic and ginger, then add vegetables | Step 6: Cook until vegetables are tender-crisp | Step 7: Return chicken to wok, add soy sauce | Step 8: Serve over rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Wings (2 lbs) | Hot Sauce (1/2 cup) | Butter (4 tbsp) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Honey (2 tbsp) | Ranch Dressing (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 400°F | Step 2: Pat wings dry and season with salt and pepper | Step 3: Bake on rack for 45-50 minutes until crispy | Step 4: Melt butter, mix with hot sauce, garlic, and honey | Step 5: Toss wings in sauce | Step 6: Return to oven for 5 minutes | Step 7: Serve with ranch dressing and celery sticks

ingredients_with_amounts: Ground Beef (500g) | Kidney Beans (2 cans) | Tomatoes (1 can) | Onion (1 large) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Chili Powder (2 tbsp) | Cumin (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Brown ground beef with onion and garlic | Step 2: Drain fat | Step 3: Add chili powder and cumin, cook for 1 minute | Step 4: Add tomatoes and beans with liquid | Step 5: Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes | Step 6: Season with salt and pepper | Step 7: Serve with rice, cornbread, or tortilla chips | Step 8: Top with cheese and sour cream if desired

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Thighs (1 kg) | Onion (1 large) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Ginger (2 tsp) | Curry Powder (3 tbsp) | Coconut Milk (400ml) | Chicken Broth (1 cup) | Rice (2 cups) | Vegetable Oil (2 tbsp) | Salt & Pepper (to taste)
instructions: Step 1: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces | Step 2: Dice onion and mince garlic and ginger | Step 3: Heat oil in a pot and sauté onion, garlic, and ginger until fragrant | Step 4: Add curry powder and stir for 1-2 minutes | Step 5: Add chicken and cook until lightly browned | Step 6: Pour in coconut milk and chicken broth, season with salt and pepper | Step 7: Simmer for 20-25 minutes until chicken is cooked through | Step 8: Meanwhile, cook rice according to package instructions | Step 9: Serve chicken curry over rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Sugar (2 cups) | Cocoa Powder (3/4 cup) | Baking Powder (1 1/2 tsp) | Milk (1 1/2 cups) | Eggs (3) | Vegetable Oil (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease 9x13 pan | Step 2: Mix dry ingredients in large bowl | Step 3: Add milk, eggs, and oil | Step 4: Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes | Step 5: Pour into prepared pan | Step 6: Bake for 30-35 minutes until toothpick comes clean | Step 7: Cool completely | Step 8: Frost with chocolate frosting

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 1/4 cups) | Butter (1 cup) | Brown Sugar (3/4 cup) | White Sugar (3/4 cup) | Eggs (2) | Chocolate Chips (2 cups) | Vanilla Extract (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Cream butter and sugars until light | Step 3: Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla | Step 4: Mix flour and baking soda, gradually add to wet ingredients | Step 5: Stir in chocolate chips | Step 6: Drop rounded tablespoons onto baking sheet | Step 7: Bake for 9-11 minutes until golden | Step 8: Cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before removing

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (4 cups) | Milk (1 1/4 cups warm) | Butter (1/2 cup softened) | Sugar (1 cup) | Cinnamon (2 tbsp) | Yeast (2 packets) | Powdered Sugar (1 1/2 cups)
instructions: Step 1: Dissolve yeast in warm milk with 1 tbsp sugar | Step 2: Mix flour, salt, and remaining sugar | Step 3: Cut in butter, add yeast mixture and eggs | Step 4: Knead until smooth, let rise 1 hour | Step 5: Roll out dough, spread with butter, cinnamon, and sugar | Step 6: Roll up and slice into 12 rolls | Step 7: Place in baking dish, let rise 30 minutes | Step 8: Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, glaze with powdered sugar icing

ingredients_with_amounts: Clams (2 cans) | Bacon (4 slices) | Onion (1 medium) | Celery (2 stalks) | Potatoes (3 medium) | Heavy Cream (1 cup) | Thyme (2 sprigs)
instructions: Step 1: Dice bacon and render in large pot | Step 2: Add onion and celery, sauté until soft | Step 3: Add potatoes and enough water to cover | Step 4: Simmer until potatoes are tender | Step 5: Add clams with juice and thyme | Step 6: Stir in cream and heat through | Step 7: Season with salt and pepper | Step 8: Serve with oyster crackers

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (3 cups) | Coconut (1 1/2 cups shredded) | Sugar (1 cup) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Eggs (2) | Coconut Milk (1 cup) | Baking Powder (2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease loaf pan | Step 2: Mix flour, baking powder, and salt | Step 3: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs | Step 4: Alternate adding dry ingredients and coconut milk | Step 5: Fold in shredded coconut | Step 6: Pour into loaf pan | Step 7: Bake for 50-60 minutes until golden | Step 8: Cool before slicing

ingredients_with_amounts: Shrimp (500g) | Coconut Milk (2 cans) | Curry Paste (2 tbsp) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Ginger (1 inch) | Lime Juice (2 tbsp) | Rice (2 cups)
instructions: Step 1: Sauté curry paste in oil until fragrant | Step 2: Add onion, garlic, and ginger, cook until soft | Step 3: Pour in coconut milk and bring to simmer | Step 4: Add shrimp and cook until pink (about 3-4 minutes) | Step 5: Stir in lime juice | Step 6: Season with salt to taste | Step 7: Serve over jasmine rice | Step 8: Garnish with cilantro

ingredients_with_amounts: Coconut (2 cups grated) | Brown Sugar (2 cups) | Ginger (2 inch grated) | Salt (1/4 tsp) | Vanilla (1 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Combine coconut, sugar, ginger, and salt in heavy pot | Step 2: Add 1/2 cup water and bring to boil | Step 3: Cook stirring constantly until mixture thickens | Step 4: Mixture is ready when it pulls away from pot sides | Step 5: Add vanilla and stir | Step 6: Drop spoonfuls onto greased baking sheet | Step 7: Let cool completely until set | Step 8: Store in airtight container

ingredients_with_amounts: Coconut Milk (2 cups) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Scotch Bonnet (2 whole) | Thyme (3 sprigs)
instructions: Step 1: Pour coconut milk into heavy saucepan | Step 2: Add whole scotch bonnet and thyme | Step 3: Simmer over medium-low heat, stirring frequently | Step 4: Cook until oil separates and sauce thickens (about 20 minutes) | Step 5: Remove scotch bonnet and thyme | Step 6: Season with salt to taste | Step 7: Serve over fish or vegetables | Step 8: Can be stored in refrigerator for up to 1 week

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Brown Sugar (1 cup) | Butter (1/2 cup cold) | Cinnamon (2 tbsp) | Pecans (1/2 cup) | Powdered Sugar (1 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease 9-inch pan | Step 2: Make streusel: mix brown sugar, cinnamon, pecans | Step 3: Cut in cold butter until crumbly | Step 4: Prepare cake batter according to package or recipe | Step 5: Pour half the batter into pan | Step 6: Sprinkle with half the streusel | Step 7: Add remaining batter and top with streusel | Step 8: Bake for 35-40 minutes, drizzle with glaze

ingredients_with_amounts: Cornmeal (1 1/2 cups) | Flour (1/2 cup) | Buttermilk (1 1/2 cups) | Eggs (2) | Butter (1/2 cup melted) | Baking Powder (1 tbsp) | Honey (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 400°F, grease cast iron skillet | Step 2: Mix cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt | Step 3: Whisk buttermilk, eggs, and honey | Step 4: Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed | Step 5: Stir in melted butter | Step 6: Pour into hot skillet | Step 7: Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden | Step 8: Serve warm with butter

ingredients_with_amounts: Cornmeal (1 cup) | Flour (1 cup) | Salt (1 tsp) | Butter (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Mix cornmeal, flour, and salt | Step 2: Cut in butter until mixture is crumbly | Step 3: Add cold water gradually until dough forms | Step 4: Knead gently and shape into small balls | Step 5: Flatten slightly with thumb | Step 6: Drop into boiling soup or stew | Step 7: Cook for 15-20 minutes until tender | Step 8: Serve in soup or as a side

ingredients_with_amounts: Cornmeal (1 cup) | Milk (3 cups) | Cinnamon (1 stick) | Nutmeg (1/2 tsp) | Vanilla (1 tsp) | Condensed Milk (1/4 cup) | Salt (1/4 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Mix cornmeal with 1 cup water to make paste | Step 2: Bring milk and cinnamon to boil in pot | Step 3: Slowly whisk in cornmeal paste | Step 4: Reduce heat and stir constantly until thick | Step 5: Add nutmeg, vanilla, and salt | Step 6: Stir in condensed milk to sweeten | Step 7: Remove cinnamon stick | Step 8: Serve hot, sprinkle with additional nutmeg

ingredients_with_amounts: Crab Meat (500g) | Bread Crumbs (1 cup) | Mayonnaise (1/4 cup) | Egg (1) | Green Onions (3) | Old Bay Seasoning (1 tbsp) | Lemon (1)
instructions: Step 1: Pick through crab meat to remove any shells | Step 2: Mix mayonnaise, egg, Old Bay, and chopped green onions | Step 3: Gently fold in crab meat and 1/2 cup bread crumbs | Step 4: Form into 6 cakes | Step 5: Coat with remaining bread crumbs | Step 6: Chill for 30 minutes | Step 7: Pan-fry in butter until golden on both sides | Step 8: Serve with lemon wedges and tartar sauce

ingredients_with_amounts: Pasta (500g) | Mushrooms (500g) | Heavy Cream (1 1/2 cups) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Parmesan Cheese (1/2 cup) | Butter (2 tbsp) | Parsley (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Cook pasta according to package directions | Step 2: Slice mushrooms | Step 3: Sauté garlic in butter, add mushrooms | Step 4: Cook until mushrooms release liquid and brown | Step 5: Add cream and simmer until slightly thickened | Step 6: Stir in parmesan cheese | Step 7: Toss with cooked pasta | Step 8: Garnish with parsley and serve

ingredients_with_amounts: Goat Meat (2 lbs) | Curry Powder (3 tbsp) | Onion (1 large) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Ginger (2 inch) | Potatoes (3) | Scotch Bonnet (1) | Green Onions (4) | Thyme (3 sprigs)
instructions: Step 1: Cut goat meat into pieces, wash and drain | Step 2: Marinate with garlic, ginger, and green onions for 1 hour | Step 3: Toast curry powder in heavy pot until fragrant | Step 4: Brown meat in batches, set aside | Step 5: Sauté onion until soft | Step 6: Return meat to pot, add water to cover and scotch bonnet | Step 7: Simmer covered for 1 1/2 hours until meat is tender | Step 8: Add potatoes and cook 20 more minutes, serve with rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Eggs (6 hard-boiled) | Mayonnaise (1/4 cup) | Mustard (1 tbsp) | Celery (2 stalks) | Bread (8 slices) | Paprika (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Peel and chop hard-boiled eggs | Step 2: Dice celery finely | Step 3: Mix eggs, celery, mayonnaise, and mustard | Step 4: Season with salt and pepper | Step 5: Toast bread if desired | Step 6: Spread egg salad on 4 slices | Step 7: Top with remaining bread | Step 8: Cut in half and serve

ingredients_with_amounts: Eggplant (2 large) | Bread Crumbs (2 cups) | Eggs (3) | Flour (1 cup) | Marinara Sauce (3 cups) | Mozzarella Cheese (2 cups) | Parmesan Cheese (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Slice eggplant into 1/2-inch rounds | Step 2: Salt and let sit for 30 minutes, pat dry | Step 3: Set up breading station: flour, beaten eggs, bread crumbs | Step 4: Dredge eggplant in flour, then egg, then bread crumbs | Step 5: Fry until golden on both sides | Step 6: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 7: Layer sauce, eggplant, and cheeses in baking dish | Step 8: Bake for 30 minutes until bubbly

ingredients_with_amounts: Fish (1 whole) | Vinegar (1/2 cup) | Carrots (2) | Onions (2) | Bell Peppers (2) | Scotch Bonnet (2) | Black Pepper (1 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Score fish on both sides, season with salt and pepper | Step 2: Fry fish until crispy and cooked through | Step 3: Remove fish and keep warm | Step 4: Julienne carrots, onions, and bell peppers | Step 5: Sauté vegetables briefly, add vinegar and scotch bonnet | Step 6: Simmer for 2 minutes | Step 7: Pour pickled vegetables over fish | Step 8: Serve with festival or bammy

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Cornmeal (1/2 cup) | Sugar (1/4 cup) | Baking Powder (2 tsp) | Salt (1/2 tsp) | Vanilla (1 tsp) | Oil (for frying)
instructions: Step 1: Mix flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt | Step 2: Add vanilla and enough water to form soft dough | Step 3: Knead gently until smooth | Step 4: Divide dough and roll into 4-inch logs | Step 5: Heat oil in deep skillet | Step 6: Fry until golden brown on all sides | Step 7: Drain on paper towels | Step 8: Serve with jerk chicken or fish

ingredients_with_amounts: White Fish (500g) | Potatoes (4 large) | Flour (1 cup) | Beer (1 cup) | Baking Powder (1 tsp) | Oil (for frying) | Tartar Sauce (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Peel potatoes and cut into thick fries | Step 2: Soak in cold water for 30 minutes, pat dry | Step 3: Fry potatoes at 325°F until soft, drain | Step 4: Mix flour, baking powder, and salt, whisk in beer | Step 5: Dip fish in batter, let excess drip off | Step 6: Fry fish at 375°F until golden | Step 7: Increase oil temp to 375°F, fry potatoes again until crispy | Step 8: Serve with tartar sauce and malt vinegar

ingredients_with_amounts: Fish (500g) | Potatoes (500g) | Bread Crumbs (1 cup) | Onion (1 small) | Egg (1) | Parsley (2 tbsp) | Lemon Zest (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Poach fish until cooked, flake into bowl | Step 2: Boil and mash potatoes | Step 3: Mix fish, potatoes, finely chopped onion, parsley, and lemon zest | Step 4: Season with salt and pepper | Step 5: Form into patties | Step 6: Dip in beaten egg, then bread crumbs | Step 7: Pan-fry until golden on both sides | Step 8: Serve with tartar sauce or lemon wedges

ingredients_with_amounts: White Fish (500g) | Corn Tortillas (12) | Cabbage (2 cups shredded) | Lime (2) | Cilantro (1/4 cup) | Sour Cream (1/2 cup) | Hot Sauce (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Season fish with salt, pepper, and cumin | Step 2: Grill or pan-fry fish until cooked through | Step 3: Warm tortillas in dry skillet | Step 4: Shred cabbage | Step 5: Flake fish into pieces | Step 6: Assemble tacos with fish, cabbage, and cilantro | Step 7: Drizzle with crema (sour cream + lime juice) | Step 8: Serve with hot sauce and lime wedges

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (4 cups) | Water (1 3/4 cups warm) | Yeast (2 packets) | Olive Oil (1/4 cup) | Rosemary (3 sprigs) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Salt (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Dissolve yeast in warm water | Step 2: Mix flour and salt, add yeast mixture and 2 tbsp oil | Step 3: Knead until smooth, let rise 1 hour | Step 4: Press dough into oiled baking sheet | Step 5: Dimple dough with fingers | Step 6: Drizzle with remaining oil, top with rosemary and garlic | Step 7: Let rise 30 minutes | Step 8: Bake at 425°F for 20-25 minutes until golden

ingredients_with_amounts: Onions (5 large) | Beef Broth (8 cups) | Butter (4 tbsp) | Thyme (4 sprigs) | Baguette (1 loaf) | Gruyere Cheese (200g) | Sherry Vinegar (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Slice onions thinly | Step 2: Melt butter in large pot, add onions | Step 3: Cook slowly for 30-40 minutes until caramelized | Step 4: Add thyme and broth, simmer for 20 minutes | Step 5: Add sherry vinegar, season with salt and pepper | Step 6: Toast baguette slices | Step 7: Ladle soup into bowls, top with toast and cheese | Step 8: Broil until cheese is melted and bubbly

ingredients_with_amounts: Bread (8 slices) | Eggs (4) | Milk (1 cup) | Butter (2 tbsp) | Cinnamon (1 tsp) | Vanilla (1 tsp) | Maple Syrup (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla | Step 2: Dip bread slices in egg mixture | Step 3: Let excess drip off | Step 4: Melt butter in skillet | Step 5: Cook bread until golden on both sides | Step 6: Keep warm in oven | Step 7: Serve with maple syrup | Step 8: Dust with powdered sugar if desired

ingredients_with_amounts: Plantain (2 ripe) | Oil (1 cup) | Salt (1/4 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Peel plantains and slice diagonally | Step 2: Heat oil in skillet | Step 3: Fry slices until golden on first side | Step 4: Flip and fry until golden | Step 5: Drain on paper towels | Step 6: Sprinkle with salt while hot | Step 7: Serve as a side dish | Step 8: Can be served with rice and beans

ingredients_with_amounts: Rice (3 cups cooked
category: day-old) | Eggs (3) | Carrots (2) | Peas (1 cup) | Green Onions (4) | Soy Sauce (3 tbsp) | Garlic (2 cloves)
column6: Step 1: Scramble eggs in wok, remove | Step 2: Stir-fry carrots and peas until tender | Step 3: Add rice and break up clumps | Step 4: Add garlic and green onions | Step 5: Return eggs to wok | Step 6: Add soy sauce and stir-fry until combined | Step 7: Season with pepper | Step 8: Serve hot

ingredients_with_amounts: Bananas (2 ripe) | Strawberries (1 cup) | Yogurt (1 cup) | Milk (1/2 cup) | Honey (1 tbsp) | Vanilla Extract (1 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Peel bananas | Step 2: Wash strawberries | Step 3: Combine all ingredients in blender | Step 4: Blend until smooth | Step 5: Add more milk if too thick | Step 6: Pour into glasses | Step 7: Serve immediately | Step 8: Garnish with mint if desired

ingredients_with_amounts: Bread (1 loaf) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Parsley (2 tbsp) | Parmesan Cheese (1/4 cup) | Olive Oil (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Soften butter | Step 3: Mince garlic and parsley | Step 4: Mix butter, garlic, parsley, and parmesan | Step 5: Slice bread without cutting through | Step 6: Spread butter mixture between slices | Step 7: Wrap in foil and bake for 15 minutes | Step 8: Open foil and bake 5 more minutes until crispy

ingredients_with_amounts: Tomatoes (2 lbs) | Cucumber (1) | Bell Pepper (1) | Red Onion (1/2) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Olive Oil (1/4 cup) | Sherry Vinegar (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Rough chop all vegetables | Step 2: Combine in blender with garlic | Step 3: Blend until smooth but still slightly chunky | Step 4: Add olive oil and vinegar | Step 5: Season with salt and pepper | Step 6: Chill for at least 2 hours | Step 7: Serve cold | Step 8: Garnish with diced vegetables

ingredients_with_amounts: Pastry Shells (12) | Coconut (2 cups shredded) | Brown Sugar (1 cup) | Ginger (1 inch grated) | Nutmeg (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F | Step 2: Combine coconut, brown sugar, ginger, and nutmeg | Step 3: Add enough water to moisten | Step 4: Fill pastry shells with mixture | Step 5: Pinch edges to form crust | Step 6: Bake for 15-20 minutes until golden | Step 7: Cool completely | Step 8: Serve at room temperature

ingredients_with_amounts: Coconut (3 cups grated) | Sugar (2 cups) | Ginger (1 inch grated) | Food Coloring (few drops)
instructions: Step 1: Combine coconut and sugar in heavy pot | Step 2: Add 1/2 cup water and ginger | Step 3: Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly | Step 4: Mixture will thicken and pull away from sides | Step 5: Divide mixture into portions | Step 6: Add food coloring to each portion | Step 7: Press onto baking sheet to set | Step 8: Cut into squares when cool

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Thighs (8 pieces) | Lemon Juice (1/4 cup) | Olive Oil (1/4 cup) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Oregano (2 tbsp) | Greek Yogurt (1/2 cup) | Cucumber (1/2)
instructions: Step 1: Mix lemon juice, oil, garlic, and oregano for marinade | Step 2: Marinate chicken for at least 2 hours | Step 3: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 4: Bake chicken for 35-40 minutes | Step 5: Make tzatziki: grate cucumber, squeeze out liquid | Step 6: Mix with yogurt and garlic | Step 7: Serve chicken with tzatziki | Step 8: Garnish with oregano

ingredients_with_amounts: Cucumber (1) | Tomatoes (2 cups cherry) | Red Onion (1/2) | Feta Cheese (200g) | Kalamata Olives (1/2 cup) | Olive Oil (1/4 cup) | Oregano (1 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Chop cucumber into chunks | Step 2: Halve cherry tomatoes | Step 3: Slice red onion thinly | Step 4: Combine vegetables in bowl | Step 5: Add olives | Step 6: Crumble feta over top | Step 7: Drizzle with olive oil and oregano | Step 8: Toss gently and serve

ingredients_with_amounts: Bread (8 slices) | Cheddar Cheese (8 slices) | Butter (4 tbsp) | Tomato (1 optional)
instructions: Step 1: Butter one side of each bread slice | Step 2: Place cheese between two slices, buttered sides out | Step 3: Heat skillet over medium heat | Step 4: Grill sandwich until golden on bottom | Step 5: Flip and grill other side | Step 6: Add tomato slices if desired | Step 7: Cook until cheese is melted | Step 8: Cut in half and serve

ingredients_with_amounts: Salmon (4 pieces) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Dill (2 tbsp) | Lemon (1) | Salt (1 tsp) | Pepper (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Brush salmon with olive oil | Step 2: Season with salt, pepper, and minced garlic | Step 3: Preheat grill to medium-high | Step 4: Place salmon skin-side down | Step 5: Grill for 4-6 minutes per side | Step 6: Squeeze lemon over fish | Step 7: Sprinkle with fresh dill | Step 8: Serve immediately

ingredients_with_amounts: Avocados (3 ripe) | Tomato (1) | Onion (1/4) | Cilantro (2 tbsp) | Lime Juice (2 tbsp) | Garlic (1 clove) | Jalapeno (1)
instructions: Step 1: Mash avocados in bowl | Step 2: Dice tomato and onion finely | Step 3: Mince jalapeno and garlic | Step 4: Chop cilantro | Step 5: Add all ingredients to avocado | Step 6: Add lime juice | Step 7: Mix well and season with salt | Step 8: Serve with tortilla chips

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken (1 whole) | Scotch Bonnet Peppers (2) | Green Onions (6) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Ginger (2 inch) | Thyme (2 tbsp) | Allspice (1 tbsp) | Cinnamon (1 tsp) | Nutmeg (1/2 tsp) | Brown Sugar (2 tbsp) | Soy Sauce (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Blend all seasoning ingredients into a paste | Step 2: Score chicken and rub with paste | Step 3: Marinate overnight in refrigerator | Step 4: Preheat grill with pimento wood if available | Step 5: Grill chicken over medium heat | Step 6: Turn frequently and cook until done (about 1 hour) | Step 7: Let rest 10 minutes before carving | Step 8: Serve with festival and coleslaw

ingredients_with_amounts: Pie Crust (1 9-inch) | Sweetened Condensed Milk (1 can) | Egg Yolks (3) | Lime Juice (1/2 cup) | Lime Zest (1 tbsp) | Whipped Cream (1 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F | Step 2: Whisk egg yolks until thick | Step 3: Add condensed milk and lime juice, whisk until smooth | Step 4: Stir in lime zest | Step 5: Pour into pie crust | Step 6: Bake for 15 minutes | Step 7: Cool completely, then chill | Step 8: Top with whipped cream before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (2 cups) | Butter (1 cup) | Sugar (1/2 cup powdered + 3/4 cup) | Eggs (4) | Lemon Juice (3/4 cup) | Lemon Zest (2 tbsp) | Powdered Sugar (for dusting)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F | Step 2: Mix flour and 1/2 cup powdered sugar, cut in butter | Step 3: Press into pan, bake 20 minutes | Step 4: Whisk eggs, 3/4 cup sugar, lemon juice, and zest | Step 5: Pour over hot crust | Step 6: Bake 20-25 minutes until set | Step 7: Cool completely | Step 8: Dust with powdered sugar before cutting

ingredients_with_amounts: Shrimp (500g) | Butter (4 tbsp) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Lemon Juice (2 tbsp) | Lemon Zest (1 tbsp) | Parsley (2 tbsp) | Red Pepper Flakes (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Peel and devein shrimp, pat dry | Step 2: Melt butter in skillet | Step 3: Add garlic and cook until fragrant | Step 4: Add shrimp in single layer | Step 5: Cook until pink, about 2 minutes per side | Step 6: Add lemon juice, zest, and red pepper flakes | Step 7: Stir in parsley | Step 8: Serve immediately with pasta or rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Lentils (2 cups) | Onion (1 large) | Carrots (2) | Celery (2 stalks) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Tomatoes (1 can) | Vegetable Broth (6 cups)
instructions: Step 1: Rinse lentils and pick over | Step 2: Sauté onion, carrots, celery, and garlic until soft | Step 3: Add lentils, broth, and tomatoes | Step 4: Bring to boil, reduce heat | Step 5: Simmer for 30-40 minutes until lentils are tender | Step 6: Season with salt, pepper, and cumin | Step 7: Add splash of vinegar if desired | Step 8: Serve with crusty bread

ingredients_with_amounts: Macaroni (500g) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Flour (1/2 cup) | Milk (4 cups) | Cheddar Cheese (3 cups) | Bread Crumbs (1 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 375°F | Step 2: Cook macaroni al dente, drain | Step 3: Melt butter, whisk in flour for roux | Step 4: Gradually add milk, whisk until thick | Step 5: Add 2 1/2 cups cheese, stir until melted | Step 6: Combine sauce with macaroni | Step 7: Pour into baking dish, top with remaining cheese and bread crumbs | Step 8: Bake for 25-30 minutes until bubbly

ingredients_with_amounts: Mangoes (2 ripe) | Red Bell Pepper (1) | Red Onion (1/2) | Cilantro (1/4 cup) | Lime Juice (2 tbsp) | Jalapeno (1) | Salt (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Dice mangoes into small cubes | Step 2: Dice red bell pepper | Step 3: Finely chop red onion | Step 4: Mince jalapeno | Step 5: Chop cilantro | Step 6: Combine all ingredients in bowl | Step 7: Add lime juice and salt | Step 8: Chill for 30 minutes before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Goat Head (1 whole) | Green Bananas (4) | Yam (200g) | Green Onions (8) | Garlic (6 cloves) | Thyme (6 sprigs) | Scotch Bonnet (2)
instructions: Step 1: Clean goat head thoroughly | Step 2: Place in large pot with water to cover | Step 3: Add green onions, garlic, thyme, and scotch bonnet | Step 4: Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer for 3 hours | Step 5: Peel and chop green bananas and yam | Step 6: Add to pot and cook for 30 minutes | Step 7: Remove meat from bones, return to pot | Step 8: Season with salt and pepper, serve hot

ingredients_with_amounts: Potatoes (2 lbs) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Milk (1/2 cup) | Garlic (2 cloves) | Salt (1 tsp) | Black Pepper (1/2 tsp)
instructions: Step 1: Peel and quarter potatoes | Step 2: Cover with cold water, add salt | Step 3: Bring to boil and cook until tender | Step 4: Drain well | Step 5: Return to pot and mash | Step 6: Add butter and warm milk | Step 7: Mash until smooth, add roasted garlic if desired | Step 8: Season with salt and pepper

ingredients_with_amounts: Ground Beef (1 kg) | Bread Crumbs (1 cup) | Onion (1 medium) | Eggs (2) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Ketchup (1/2 cup) | Worcestershire Sauce (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Preheat oven to 350°F | Step 2: Finely chop onion and garlic | Step 3: Mix all ingredients except 1/4 cup ketchup | Step 4: Shape into loaf in baking pan | Step 5: Spread remaining ketchup on top | Step 6: Bake for 1 hour | Step 7: Let rest 10 minutes before slicing | Step 8: Serve with mashed potatoes

ingredients_with_amounts: Vegetables (2 cups mixed) | Onion (1 medium) | Carrots (2) | Celery (2 stalks) | Tomatoes (1 can) | Kidney Beans (1 can) | Vegetable Broth (6 cups) | Pasta (1/2 cup)
instructions: Step 1: Sauté onion, carrots, and celery until soft | Step 2: Add broth and tomatoes, bring to boil | Step 3: Add vegetables and beans | Step 4: Simmer for 20 minutes | Step 5: Add pasta and cook until tender | Step 6: Season with salt, pepper, and herbs | Step 7: Serve with parmesan cheese | Step 8: Drizzle with olive oil

ingredients_with_amounts: Rice (1 1/2 cups arborio) | Mushrooms (500g) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (2 cloves) | White Wine (1/2 cup) | Chicken Broth (4 cups) | Parmesan Cheese (1/2 cup) | Butter (2 tbsp)
instructions: Step 1: Sauté mushrooms until browned, set aside | Step 2: Sauté onion and garlic until soft | Step 3: Add rice and toast for 2 minutes | Step 4: Add wine and stir until absorbed | Step 5: Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly | Step 6: Continue until rice is creamy and al dente | Step 7: Stir in mushrooms, butter, and parmesan | Step 8: Serve immediately

ingredients_with_amounts: Flour (3 cups) | Yogurt (1/2 cup) | Milk (1/2 cup warm) | Yeast (2 packets) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Butter (1/4 cup melted) | Cilantro (2 tbsp)

servings: grated) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Olive Oil (1 tbsp) | Salt (1 tsp) | Black Pepper (1/2 tsp) | Nutmeg (1/4 tsp) | Red Pepper Flakes (1/4 tsp)
instructions: Main Dish
column7: Step 1: Cook fettuccine according to package directions | Step 2: In the last 3 minutes of cooking, add broccoli florets to the pasta water | Step 3: Drain pasta and broccoli together, reserving 1/2 cup pasta water | Step 4: In a large skillet, melt butter and sauté minced garlic for 1-2 minutes | Step 5: Add heavy cream, bring to simmer, then reduce heat | Step 6: Whisk in Parmesan cheese gradually until smooth | Step 7: Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg, and red pepper flakes | Step 8: Add pasta and broccoli to sauce, tossing to coat. Add reserved pasta water if needed | Step 9: Serve immediately with extra Parmesan

ingredients_with_amounts: Fettuccine Pasta (500g) | Mushrooms (500g
category: sliced) | Heavy Cream (2 cups) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Parmesan Cheese (2 cups
servings: grated) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Thyme (1 tsp
instructions: fresh or dried) | Salt (1 tsp) | Black Pepper (1/2 tsp) | Fresh Parsley (2 tbsp
column9: Step 1: Cook fettuccine according to package directions, drain and set aside | Step 2: Heat olive oil and 2 tbsp butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat | Step 3: Add sliced mushrooms and cook until golden brown and liquid evaporates, about 8-10 minutes | Step 4: Add minced garlic and thyme, cook for 1-2 minutes more | Step 5: Pour in heavy cream, bring to simmer, then reduce heat | Step 6: Whisk in remaining butter and Parmesan cheese gradually until smooth | Step 7: Season with salt and pepper | Step 8: Add cooked pasta to sauce, tossing to coat | Step 9: Garnish with fresh parsley and serve

column8: Step 1: Cook fettuccine according to package directions | Step 2: In the last 3 minutes, add broccoli to pasta water. Drain together, set aside | Step 3: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning | Step 4: Heat olive oil in a large skillet, cook chicken until golden and cooked through | Step 5: Remove chicken, add minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes | Step 6: Add heavy cream and butter, bring to simmer | Step 7: Whisk in Parmesan gradually until smooth | Step 8: Return chicken to skillet, add pasta and broccoli, toss to combine | Step 9: Serve hot with extra Parmesan

ingredients_with_amounts: Fettuccine Pasta (500g) | Fresh Spinach (6 cups) | Heavy Cream (2 cups) | Butter (1/2 cup) | Parmesan Cheese (2 cups
category: grated) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Nutmeg (1/4 tsp) | Salt (1 tsp) | Black Pepper (1/2 tsp) | Red Pepper Flakes (1/4 tsp)
column6: Step 1: Cook fettuccine according to package directions, drain and set aside | Step 2: In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat | Step 3: Add minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes | Step 4: Add fresh spinach in batches, cooking until wilted, about 3-4 minutes | Step 5: Pour in heavy cream and bring to simmer | Step 6: Whisk in Parmesan gradually until smooth | Step 7: Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg, and red pepper flakes | Step 8: Add cooked pasta to sauce, tossing to coat | Step 9: Serve immediately with extra Parmesan

ingredients_with_amounts: Fettuccine Pasta (500g
servings: soaked) | Unsweetened Almond Milk (1.5 cups) | Nutritional Yeast (1/3 cup) | Lemon Juice (2 tbsp) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Salt (1 tsp) | Black Pepper (1/2 tsp) | Nutmeg (1/4 tsp) | Fresh Parsley (2 tbsp
instructions: chopped)
column8: Step 1: Soak cashews in hot water for 1 hour, then drain | Step 2: Cook fettuccine according to package directions, drain and set aside | Step 3: In a high-speed blender, combine soaked cashews, almond milk, nutritional yeast, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper, and nutmeg | Step 4: Blend until completely smooth and creamy, about 2-3 minutes | Step 5: Pour sauce into a saucepan and warm over low heat, stirring constantly, about 3-5 minutes | Step 6: Do not boil, just heat through | Step 7: Add cooked pasta to sauce, tossing to coat | Step 8: If sauce is too thick, add a splash of pasta water | Step 9: Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately

ingredients_with_amounts: Fettuccine Pasta (500g) | Lobster Tails (2 large

instructions: minced) | White Wine (1/4 cup) | Brandy (2 tbsp
column6: optional) | Salt (1/2 tsp) | White Pepper (1/2 tsp) | Fresh Chives (2 tbsp
column10: Step 1: Cook fettuccine according to package directions, drain and set aside | Step 2: Melt 4 tbsp butter in large skillet, add lobster meat and cook 2-3 minutes until just opaque. Remove and set aside | Step 3: Add remaining butter, shallot, and garlic to skillet, cook 2 minutes | Step 4: Add white wine and brandy, simmer until reduced by half | Step 5: Add heavy cream, bring to simmer | Step 6: Whisk in Parmesan gradually until smooth | Step 7: Season with salt and white pepper | Step 8: Return lobster to skillet, add pasta and toss gently to combine | Step 9: Garnish with fresh chives and serve immediately

ingredients_with_amounts: Fettuccine Pasta (500g) | Bacon (8 slices
category: chopped) | Heavy Cream (2 cups) | Butter (1/4 cup) | Parmesan Cheese (2 cups
instructions: finely chopped) | Salt (1/2 tsp) | Black Pepper (1 tsp) | Fresh Parsley (2 tbsp
column9: Step 1: Cook fettuccine according to package directions, drain and set aside | Step 2: In a large skillet, cook bacon until crispy. Remove with slotted spoon, leaving 2 tbsp drippings | Step 3: Add butter to skillet, sauté onion and garlic until softened, about 3-4 minutes | Step 4: Pour in heavy cream, bring to simmer | Step 5: Whisk in Parmesan gradually until smooth | Step 6: Season with pepper (go easy on salt, bacon is salty) | Step 7: Add cooked pasta and most of the bacon to sauce, toss to combine | Step 8: Serve topped with remaining bacon and fresh parsley | Step 9: Add cracked black pepper before serving

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Thighs (1 kg) | Jerk Seasoning (3 tbsp) | Lime Juice (2 tbsp) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Olive Oil (2 tbsp) | Rice (2 cups) | Coconut Milk (1 cup) | Salt & Pepper (to taste)
instructions: Step 1: Rub chicken with jerk seasoning, lime juice, minced garlic, salt, and pepper | Step 2: Marinate for at least 2 hours | Step 3: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) | Step 4: Roast chicken for 35-40 minutes until cooked through | Step 5: Cook rice with coconut milk instead of water | Step 6: Serve roasted chicken over coconut rice

ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Thighs (1 kg) | Basmati Rice (2 cups) | Onion (1 large) | Garlic (4 cloves) | Ginger (2 tsp) | Yogurt (1/2 cup) | Biryani Spices (2 tbsp) | Vegetable Oil (3 tbsp) | Fresh Coriander (handful) | Salt & Pepper (to taste)
instructions: Step 1: Marinate chicken with yogurt, garlic, ginger, biryani spices, salt, and pepper for at least 1 hour | Step 2: Slice onion and sauté in oil until golden | Step 3: Add marinated chicken and cook until browned | Step 4: Partially cook rice and layer over chicken | Step 5: Cover and simmer on low for 20-25 minutes | Step 6: Garnish with fresh coriander and serve

recipe_name: Coconut Curry Chicken with Pineapple Rice
ingredients_with_amounts: Chicken Thighs (1 kg) | Onion (1 medium) | Garlic (3 cloves) | Curry Powder (2 tbsp) | Coconut Milk (400ml) | Pineapple Chunks (1 cup) | Rice (2 cups) | Vegetable Oil (2 tbsp) | Salt & Pepper (to taste)
instructions: Step 1: Dice chicken and season with salt and pepper | Step 2: Sauté onion and garlic in oil until fragrant | Step 3: Add curry powder and stir 1 minute | Step 4: Add chicken and cook until lightly browned | Step 5: Pour in coconut milk and simmer 20 minutes | Step 6: Cook rice and fold in pineapple chunks | Step 7: Serve coconut curry chicken over pineapple rice
